title: Glitter Guest Book, 80 Blank Pages 160 Sides Wedding Guestbook, Silver, Rose Gold, Champagne, Scrapbook - Boxed Case. Guest to Sign, Baby Shower, Birthday Christening, Funderal, Autograph (Rose Gold)
features: Our stunning glitter blank guest books, autograph book or scrap book are made exclusively for us and they're ideal for decorating to match your DIY wedding invitations and other on the day stationery.

High-quality with 80 pages (160 sides) of 140gsm weight inner plain white paper, there's plenty of space for guests to sign the guest book and make their best wishes for the happy couple. Covered in sparkly very low shed glitter paper they need very little decoration but can be trimmed with ribbon, labels, tags, and embellishments. Our glitter guest books come in a sturdy outer box with a thumb hole for you to easily remove the book.
Only one book is supplied depending on the colour you select. Low shed glitter that will keep hands free of glitter (does run off).
description: This DIY Wedding Guest Book Presentation Box is perfect for various occasions such as weddings, anniversaries, funerals, and baby showers. The box is available in stylish silver, champagne, and rose gold colors. 80 pages (double sided), providing ample space for guests to leave their messages. The box is customizable, making it a unique addition to your special day. It is recommended for couples getting married and comes complete in a presentation box.
